Privacy
Home/Referral Portal

Referral Portal

Access your referral portal.

Sign in with your email and password to review your code, your referrals, your credits, or your commission ledger. If needed, request a password reset email from the portal.

Referral ProgramFor clients and contacts who want future Opticable credit.Referral Partner ProgramFor businesses and professionals sending repeat referrals.Referral PortalReview your code, share link, referrals, and rewards.Request a quoteUse your referral code in the quote request.

Referral Portal

Access your referral portal.

Use your permanent portal login to review your code, your referrals, your credits, or your commission ledger.

Sign in

Sign in to your portal

Use the email address linked to your referral account and your password.

Password reset

Forgot your password?

Enter the email linked to your account. If the account exists, Opticable will send you a password reset email.

    Opticable installs and manages technology systems for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.

    9453-4757 Québec Inc.
    Licence RBQ : 5864-1648-01

    Contact details

    • General inquiriesinfo@opticable.ca
    • Quote requestsquotes@opticable.ca
    • Technical supportsupport@opticable.ca
    • Phone514-316-7236
    • Quotes and inquiriesMonday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM: by phone, email, or form
    • WeekendsSaturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM: by email or form only
    • Technical supportMonday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM · Saturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM
